pageTitle: Do you need help paying the fee for this application?
caption: Make an application
heading: Do you need help paying the fee for this application?
question: Do you need help paying the fee for this application?

errors.needHelpPayingFee: Confirm whether you need help paying the fee

options.yes: I need help paying the fee
options.no: I do not need help paying the fee

itUsuallyCostsToApply: It usually costs {{standardFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}} to apply. The fee will increase to {{maxFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}} if:
youHaveAlreadyToldTheOtherParty: you have already told the other party that you are making this application, and
theyDidNotAgreeToIt: they did not agree to it (this means that they have objected to it)
youWillSeeTheFinalApplicationFee: You’ll see the final application fee before you pay.
youMayBeAbleToGetHelp: You may be able to get help paying the fee if you (one or more of the following):
